nasb.text: Now behold, we are in your hands; do as it seems good and right in your sight to do to us.”

esv.text: And now, behold, we are in your hand. Whatever seems good and right in your sight to do to us, do it.”

cnv.text: 現在，你看，我們都在你的手裡，你看怎樣處置我們算為好、算為對，就怎樣行吧。”

ccb.text: 现在我们既然落在你的手中，你们想怎样对待我们就怎样对待吧。”
